channel.title: Extended Producer Responsibility Act of 2022 on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Extended Producer Responsibility Act of 2022 on Maharlikanism

item.title: General Provisions
item.description:
Section 2

The State to adopts a systematic comprehensive and ecological solid waste management program which shall:

item.title: Extended Producer Responsibility
item.description:
National Framework for All Types of Product Wastes

Sec. 44-A. National Framework for Extended Producer Responsiblity.

The Department, in consultation with the NSWMC, shall formulate a national framework on EPR for all types of product wastes.

item.title: Producer Responsibility Organization (PRO)
item.description:
Sec. 44-H. Producer Responsibility Organization (PRO)

Obliged enterprises may voluntarily organize themselves to form or authorize a PRO.

  • The PRO will establish a viable platform to implement their EPR program.

The Department, in consultation with the NSWMC and obliged enterprises or their PRO, shall estabish a system or parameters necessary to make the PRO sustainable and compliant.
